title: smilax hayatae
intro: Smilax hayatae, also known as the Japanese smilax or Chinese cat's claw, is a species of flowering plant in the Smilacaceae family, native to East Asia and the Korean Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Smilax hayatae include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Smilax hayatae is often prepared for herbal use in the form of extracts, capsules, or teas, and can also be used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
